name: claw-migrate
description: OpenClaw workspace backup & restore - automated with user guidance
author: Han Xueyuan <xueyuan_han@163.com>
changelog: v2.8.0: Restored executable functionality - now actually backs up and restores
Automated backup with file scanning and user confirmation
Automated restore with validation and selective recovery
ClawTalent integration: share and deploy configs
Security: auto-excludes sensitive files, scans before share
Clear guidance at each step - you always know what's happening
